company_context: Astrato | Cloud-Native Self-Service BI with Live Data & AI Log in Start Trial Book a demo Book a demo Stunning Analytics for Your Cloud Data for self-service BI , customer-facing dashboards & data apps Live-connect to your data in: Looking to upgrade your BI? We can help you in three ways Modernize your BI for the cloud You’ve moved your data to the cloud, so why keep your analytics stuck in outdated legacy BI? Astrato delivers a true cloud-native experience with live-query dashboards, ease of use, and infinite performance at scale, eliminating the need for outdated “lift-and-shift” migrations. Learn More Customer-facing analytics Build revenue-generating, interactive analytics products that give your business a competitive edge. Seamlessly integrate live analytics into SaaS platforms, customer portals, and internal tools, delivering premium data experiences that drive engagement, retention, and new revenue streams. Learn More No-code Self-Service BI Empower teams of any skillset to consume, explore, analyze, and act on data independently, without IT dependency and in the format they prefer. With AI-powered insights, drag-and-drop dashboards, no-code measure building, and writeback capabilities, Astrato makes scalable self-service BI a reality. Learn More The Astrato Difference Everything you ♥️ about BI, reimagined for the cloud Legacy BI wasn’t built for the world we work in today. It came from an on-premise era – patched with add-ons, weighed down by complexity, and slow to adapt. Astrato is different. Built-in interactivity & Data Apps With writeback and Action Blocks baked in, you can turn dashboards into dynamic apps – updating data, triggering workflows, and automating decisions directly inside the analytics experience. ✨ GenAI at your fingertips Ask questions like you’d ask a colleague – Astrato turns them into answers, charts, and insights in seconds. Explore with built-in AI or plug in your own pre-trained AI provider for full flexibility, on your terms. Consumer-grade, no-code UI Powerful self-service analytics for technical and business users with an intuitive, no-code UI. World-class data visualization Design fully custom, on-brand dashboards that update on the fly as users interact: smooth, animated, and built for exploration. Zero-copy, live-query architecture Work directly with your cloud warehouse – no extracts, no fragmented versions of the truth, no duplication, but infinite performance and traceable data lineage. ‍ ‍ Embedded analytics Fully white-labeled, fully interactive, and built for seamless integration into SaaS products, customer portals, and internal tools. ‍ ‍ Ready to upgrade your BI? ⚡Faster, smarter decisions Live data, AI-powered insights, and built-in workflows mean teams can act instantly – no delays, no IT bottlenecks. 🧘‍♂️ Data for everyone A no-code, intuitive experience makes analytics accessible to everyone, while governance keeps data secure. 💰Monetizable, scalable BI Whether embedding analytics or enabli

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours get the most out of their data. I came across Astrato and noticed you're using cloud-native self-service BI. Can you tell me a bit about your current data analytics setup?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (sighs) Look, we're happy with our current BI tool. It's serving our purposes, and I'm not sure we're in the market for anything new. What makes you think we need DeepData AI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand your skepticism, but I'd like to highlight that our solution can complement your existing BI tool. We've worked with companies similar to yours, and they've seen significant improvements in data processing speed and accuracy. Our AI-powered solution can help you uncover hidden insights and make data-driven decisions faster. Would you be open to exploring how DeepData AI can enhance your current setup?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (hesitant) I suppose, but we're on a tight budget, and I'm not sure we can justify the cost of another data solution. Our current tool is already expensive, and I'm not convinced that adding another layer will be worth the investment.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your concerns about budget. However, our solution is designed to be cost-effective and scalable. We've had customers see a significant return on investment within the first few months of implementation. I'd be happy to provide some case studies and ROI analysis to demonstrate the potential value. Additionally, we offer flexible pricing plans to accommodate different budgets and growth stages. Can I ask, what are your top priorities when it comes to data analytics, and how do you see DeepData AI fitting into your current strategy?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (thoughtfully) Well, we're looking to improve our customer-facing analytics and provide more personalized experiences. But I'm still not sure how DeepData AI would integrate with our existing tools and workflows. We've had issues with integration in the past, and I don't want to add another complexity to our tech stack.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I appreciate your concerns about integration. Our solution is designed to be seamless and adaptable to various tech stacks. We've integrated with numerous BI tools, including cloud-native solutions like yours. I'd be happy to provide a customized demo to show you how DeepData AI can work in tandem with your existing tools. We can also offer a trial period to test the integration and ensure it meets your requirements. Would you be willing to schedule a demo and explore the possibilities?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo. I'm curious to see how DeepData AI can help us improve our customer-facing analytics and integrate with our existing tools. But I expect to see some concrete examples and a clear plan for implementation.

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Integration
Feedback: The seller could have more effectively addressed the buyer's concerns by providing specific examples of successful integrations with similar companies earlier in the conversation. Sentiment: Neutral
